content: Just as curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation (ICM) mechanisms push autonomous agents to seek out novel, high-information experiences rather than just chasing predefined rewards, 2024-2025 SOTA active learning memory systems can be rearchitected to prioritize storing 'curiosity-anchored' memories, where agent curiosity acts as a built-in filtering signal for what the agent retains instead of relying on hand-engineered storage heuristics. This creates a fully autonomous active learning loop where the agent’s own intrinsic curiosity shapes both what data it explores and what it keeps in long-term memory to improve future exploration.
